# Gremlin Horn

## Description

- Whenever an enemy dies, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Stronger in multi-enemy fights; kill sequencing can refund energy and draw into additional attacks.
- Enemy kills from potions can trigger the energy and draw.
- Battle Trance's No Draw blocks the card draw from kills, but Gremlin Horn still grants the energy.
